mapper.select: SELECT name_ko, quote, user_type, description, image_url FROM persona_types WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT pt.tag_text FROM persona_tags pt JOIN persona_types p ON pt.persona_id = p.persona_id WHERE p.code = #{code} ORDER BY pt.tag_id
SELECT pr.title, pr.detail FROM persona_recommendations pr JOIN persona_types p ON pr.persona_id = p.persona_id WHERE p.code = #{code} ORDER BY pr.rec_id
